typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

colors.usage_rules: Use 'slate' scale for neutrals. Primary color is Indigo-500. Avoid harsh blacks; use Slate-900 for text.

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-full border-r border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50 backdrop-blur-xl z-30 hidden md:flex flex-col
structure.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-20 flex items-center px-6 justify-between

card.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm hover:shadow rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
button.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

input.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badge.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors or extremely subtle mesh gradients (opacity 5%) for backgrounds only.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or buttons.
Do not center-align main content; use left alignment for readability.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
All interactive elements must have a hover state.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Primary color is Indigo (#6366f1). Use it sparingly for key actions.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (Slate-600+ on White).
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the dashboard using the 'Bento Grid Mode B' layout. Use the provided color palette in tailwind.config.js. Create reusable components for Cards, Stats, and Tables based on the 'Soft Utility' archetype. Ensure the sidebar is fixed and the main content scrolls. Use Recharts for analytics with the specified chart colors.
